top_signals.title: Intertek to quit FTSE 100 after agreeing £10bn EQT takeover
top_signals.summary: FTSE 100 giant Intertek has agreed to a £10bn takeover by Swedish buyout firm EQT, triggering the latest high-profile departure from the London Stock Exchange. The testing and assurance company said on Thursday that it has agreed to the £60 per share offer, valuing the deal at about £10.6bn. The agreement seals a long-running saga [...]

top_signals.title: Oncolys president reflects on long journey to world-first cancer treatment
top_signals.summary: Yasuo Urata hopes the newly approved viral therapy will improve quality of life for esophageal cancer patients.

top_signals.title: FortiBleed leak exposes Fortinet VPN credentials for 73,000 devices.
top_signals.summary: A newly discovered data leak dubbed "FortiBleed" has exposed what appears to be a collection of Fortinet and FortiGate VPN credentials for 73,932 firewall URLs at organizations worldwide. [...]
